replacements.originalText: Embed codebase for improved contextual understanding and knowledge. Embeddings and metadata are stored in the
replacements.changeText: 嵌入代码库以提升上下文理解和知识。嵌入和元数据存储在

replacements.originalText: , but all code is stored locally.
Automatically index any new folders with fewer than
replacements.changeText: 自动索引包含少于(with fewer than)

replacements.originalText: Files to exclude from indexing in addition to .gitignore.
replacements.changeText: 除 .gitignore 外，还要从索引中排除的文件。
为即时 Grep 索引仓库

replacements.originalText: Automatically index repositories to speed up Grep searches. All data is stored locally.
replacements.changeText: 自动索引仓库以加速 Grep 搜索。所有数据均存储在本地。

replacements.originalText: Crawl and index custom resources and developer docs
replacements.changeText: 爬取并索引自定义资源和开发者文档

replacements.originalText: Add documentation to use as context. You can also use @Add in Chat or while editing to add a doc.
replacements.changeText: 添加文档以用作上下文。也可在聊天或编辑时使用 @Add 添加文档。
